content: Tell me about Ravjit Singh from service linkup
Ravjit Singh is the creator of Service Linkup.
Tell me about professionals table in service linkup

Here is the information about the professionals table in Service Linkup. It lists three individuals: Ravjit Singh, Aditya Kumar, and Vipin kumar.

Ravjit Singh is listed as a Developer with 4 years of experience. Aditya Kumar is also a Developer with 4 years of experience. Vipin kumar is listed as a Video editing and script writing professional with 1 year of experience.
Tell about Ravjit Singh in detail
Ravjit Singh is the creator of Rashboard and other projects such as Service Linkup, YourHost, and Devstore.
No I mean give me information about Ravjit Singh which is available on service linkup
Ravjit Singh is listed as a Developer with 4 years of experience in the professionals table of Service Linkup.
Give his all details in detail from service linkup

Here is the detailed information about Ravjit Singh from Service Linkup:

**Ravjit Singh's Profile in Service Linkup:**

*   **Role:** Developer
*   **Experience:** 4 years

He is listed alongside Aditya Kumar as a Developer with 4 years of experience.
Now mail this information to juthabanda@gmail.com with subject "Ravjit Singh"
The information regarding Ravjit Singh from Service Linkup has been successfully sent to juthabanda@gmail.com with the subject "Ravjit Singh".
Tell me everything about yourhost along with its Install command

YourHost is a self-hosting platform for Minecraft server hosting needs, allowing users to manage their servers and hosting services with a simple and intuitive interface.

The installation command for YourHost is: `curl -sL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Ravjit-singh/yourhost/main/install.sh | bash`
Great now mail this information to juthabanda@gmail.com with subject "YourHost"
I have successfully sent the information about YourHost to juthabanda@gmail.com with the subject "YourHost".
What are the urls for Yourhost like where is it deployed etc and all I want full details

YourHost is a self-hosting platform designed for Minecraft server hosting. You can manage your servers and hosting services through a simple and intuitive interface.

The main URL for YourHost is `https://ravjit-singh.github.io/yourhost`.

The installation command to set up YourHost is: `curl -sL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Ravjit-singh/yourhost/main/install.sh | bash`.
Mail these details to sukhjitsingh5737@gmail.com with subject "Yourhost use krke dekh mera"
I have sent the details about YourHost to sukhjitsingh5737@gmail.com with the subject "Yourhost use krke dekh mera".
